title: WMS API - Responses
description: JSON schemas for the two response types of the WMS API asynchronous flow.

ImmediateACK.title: Immediate Acknowledgment
ImmediateACK.description: Synchronous response returned immediately by the WMS when a message is received. This confirms delivery only — it does NOT guarantee the message has been validated or processed.

label.description: Human-readable message confirming receipt of the request.
label.example: Message has been received. This is not a guarantee that the message has been read or understood.

success.description: Reception status code / 1 = message received by the WMS.

AsyncErrorCallback.title: Async Error Callback
AsyncErrorCallback.description: Sent asynchronously BY THE WMS to the client's own endpoint when validation errors are detected during message processing. The client must expose a webhook endpoint to receive this payload. This response is optional — it is only sent if the client has configured a callback URL with their WMS consultant.

response.description: Root wrapper of the error callback payload.

ResponseBody.title: Response Body
ResponseBody.description: Body of the async error callback. Contains message metadata and the list of validation errors detected by the WMS.

uuid.description: Unique identifier of the original message. Empty string if not applicable.

message.description: Code of the WMS message type that generated the errors (e.g. M40 = Reception Orders, M30 = Product Master).

timestamp.description: Date and time when the WMS processed the message / format YYYYMMDDHHmmss.

errors.description: List of validation errors detected in the original message. One entry per field error.

ErrorDetail.title: Error Detail
ErrorDetail.description: Individual validation error detected on a specific field of the original message.

line.description: Line number of the record in the original message where the error was detected (1-based).

type.description: Data type of the field that failed validation / string = text field, integer = integer field, string_double = decimal number, date = date field (YYYYMMDD), boolean = true/false field.

field.description: Name of the WMS field that contains the validation error.

receivedValue.description: Actual value received in the field that caused the error.

error.description: Human-readable description of the validation rule that was violated.
error.example: Max valor permitido : 30 Valor indicado en : MSGLIG = Producto en cuarentena hasta análisis

EnumErrorType.description: Data type of the field that failed validation / string = text, integer = integer, string_double = decimal number, date = date YYYYMMDD, boolean = true/false
